current.title: Favicon Fixes + Forced-Restart Verification (LinkMap)
current.description: Blank favicons: for claude.ai / platform.claude.com (pinned + tree entries) and **grey circles* for `file://` local HTML pages and `chrome://` pages. Root-caused by scout exploration (verified with file:line):; F2 (to confirm live):: Chromium's `_favicon/` route returns a blank 200 (not an error) on cache miss — `onerror` never fires, image renders as empty pixels. Likely for per-thread claude.ai URLs with no saved icon.; Started: 2026-07-12
